name: BALCHEM CORP
summary: Balchem Corporation, incorporated in Maryland in 1967, develops, manufactures, distributes, and markets specialty performance ingredients and products for nutritional, food, pharmaceutical, animal health, plant nutrition, sterilization, fumigation, and industrial markets. Key products include choline nutrients, mineral amino acid chelates, vitamin K2, MSM, microencapsulated ingredients, ethylene oxide, propylene oxide, ammonia, and chelated minerals. The company operates three reportable segments: Human Nutrition and Health, Animal Nutrition and Health, and Specialty Products.

products.name: Choline Nutrients
products.description: Human grade choline nutrients for brain development, fat metabolism, and neural functions in nutrition and health applications.

products.name: Mineral Amino Acid Chelates
products.description: Specialized mineral salts and complexes used as raw materials in premier human nutrition products.

products.name: Vitamin K2
products.description: Specialty vitamin K2 supporting bone health, heart health, and immunity.

products.name: Methylsulfonylmethane (MSM)
products.description: Nutritional ingredient providing benefits for joint health, sports nutrition, skin, beauty, and healthy aging.

products.name: Microencapsulation Solutions
products.description: Encapsulation for food, pharmaceutical, and nutritional ingredients to enhance performance, shelf life, and processing.

products.name: Choline Chloride
products.description: Essential nutrient for monogastric animal health, supplied to poultry, pet, and swine industries in dry and aqueous forms.

products.name: Ethylene Oxide
products.description: Sterilant gas for health care industry used to sterilize medical devices.

products.name: Propylene Oxide
products.description: Fumigant for insect and microbiological control in nuts, spices, cocoa, dried fruits, and chemical synthesis.

products.name: Ammonia
products.description: Used as refrigerant, for heat treatment of metals, and chemical synthesis; distributed in reusable drum and cylinder packaging.

products.name: Metalosate Chelated Minerals
products.description: Patented foliar-applied amino acid chelate products for plant mineral nutrition optimizing crop health and yield.

products.name: Cereal Systems
products.description: Cereal systems for ready-to-eat cereals, grain-based snacks, and cereal-based ingredients.

products.name: Spray Dried and Emulsified Powders
products.description: Customized spray dried and emulsified powders for beverage, dairy, and food product development.
